record.field: # Bounded backend sync action for Azure Foundry Copilot. # Validates config and logs sync intent. Does not call Azure APIs. service = env["ipai.foundry.service"] result = service.ensure_agent() if result.get("status") == "warning": log("Foundry sync: %s" % result.get("message", ""), level="warning") else: log("Foundry sync: %s" % result.get("message", ""), level="info")
